climate.description: Typical Swedish summer: mild, pleasant for riding with low humidity.

fondo_rating.scoring_notes: Migrated from gravel-race-automation. Original score: 67. adventure dimension dropped, road_surface added. Score recalculated: 64.

course_description.character: A demanding road ultra looping through Jämtland's forested hills and lake-dotted plains around Östersund, blending steady climbs with fast rollers on smooth tarmac.
course_description.signature_challenge: The 'Jämtland Wall' - a 2-mile grind at 7% average near the 100-mile mark, often deciding the race in crosswinds.
suffering_zones: Central Hills Climb: Mid-race 20-mile section with repeated 5-8% gradients totaling 2000 ft gain, testing pacing in exposed terrain.
Lake Side Rollers: Final 30 miles of punchy undulations beside Storsjön, where fatigue amplifies short but steep kicks.
Östersund Finish Drag: Urban approach with headwinds and false flats, mentally grinding to the city-center line.

logistics.lodging_strategy: Plenty of hotels and Airbnbs in Östersund; campgrounds nearby for budget options.
logistics.transport: Straightforward event in Östersund with central start/finish, ample support, and easy navigation for international riders.

history.origin_story: Beloved local road ultra fostering Jämtland's endurance cycling tradition, growing steadily among Swedish riders.

final_verdict.one_liner: Ultimate Swedish road ultra for endurance junkies craving value-packed suffering.
